final:
// // This module divides an 8-bit input by 2 instead of 4
module divide_by_4 (
    input wire [3:0] in,
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    output reg [1:0] out
);
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            out <= 2'b00;
        end else begin
            out <= in[3:2]; // Divide by 4 by taking the two higher bits
        end
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module divides an 8-bit input by 2 instead of 4
